body.title: Recurring pe_chain failure: old_string_not_found
body.result: pattern was test pollution — infra.pe_failure_log count inflated by test_pe_chain_inertia_gate.py calling _pe_escalate without DB mock; all production pe_hypothesize calls have response_len=0 (tier2 unavailable); zero real old_string_not_found retries in LLM IO logs; fix is T-pe-failure-log-test-isolation
body.description:
pe_chain has escalated with failure_type='old_string_not_found' 3 times. Recurring pattern detected by failure accumulator.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/coding
**Scope boundary:** In scope: root-cause analysis and fix for old_string_not_found. Out of scope: other failure types.
**Test plan:** After fix, infra.pe_failure_log count for 'old_string_not_found' stops growing.
